mapper.sql: select DISTINCT nt.id, nt.type, nt.category, nt.title, nt.context, nt.imgs, nt.lowest_price, nt.peak_price, nt.cycle, nt.cycle_unit, nt.closing_time, nt.status, nt.is_hidden, nt.is_del, nt.sort, nt.is_top, nt.creator, nt.created_at, nt.reviewer, nt.reviewer_at, nt.invitation_code, nt.remark , (select nickname from zhs_center_project.users u where u.uuid = nt.creator) created_name , (select avatar from zhs_center_project.users u where u.uuid = nt.creator) avatar
mapper.insert:
insert into agent_need_task
id, type, category, title, `context`, imgs, lowest_price, peak_price, `cycle`, cycle_unit, closing_time, `status`, is_hidden, is_del, sort, is_top, creator, created_at, reviewer, reviewer_at, invitation_code, remark,
#{id}, #{type}, #{category}, #{title}, #{context}, #{imgs}, #{lowestPrice}, #{peakPrice}, #{cycle}, #{cycleUnit}, #{closingTime}, #{status}, #{isHidden}, #{isDel}, #{sort}, #{isTop}, #{creator}, #{createdAt}, #{reviewer}, #{reviewerAt}, #{invitationCode}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from agent_need_task where id in
#{id}
